Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and ESG Partnership between Cong Ty TNHH Thien Bao Capital and Cong Ty Co Phan Nam Phong Green Materials (HOSE applicant; Ticker: NPG*; LEI: 0000FAKELEI0000; ISIN: VN-EXAMPLE-123-XYZ).
Transaction: Proposed minority equity subscription and supply–offtake MOU; Vietnamese law governed; anticipated listing venue HOSE; SSC notification and review as applicable.
Consideration: Equity subscription coupled with ESG-linked supplier credit; pricing to be determined by independent appraisal per Decree 155; no market-sensitive amounts stated herein.
Conditions precedent: SBV-compliant VND settlement via designated bank accounts (Account IDs 777-ABC-VND and 555-XYZ-VND, placeholders only); VSDC registration of subscribed shares.
Public/stale references: Issuer has publicly announced its 2025 sustainability roadmap and prior cyber drill results; this term sheet references items already available on HOSE portal.
Educational operations: Information-barrier procedure overview for employees; intranet blackout calendars; anti-tipping training; insider-list template (blank) attached for onboarding.
Crypto training reference: No token issuance; marketing demo uses hypothetical “LotusToken” to educate staff on disclosure risks; not related to any live securities offering.
ESG engagement: Investor to support climate reporting capacity-building; sample greenhouse KPI workbook is illustrative and not price-relevant.
Commercial terms branding: Customer materials may state “flexible payment terms” for marketing; such language is generic and not a signal of negotiated price or concessions.
Cyber tabletop: Annual cyber incident tabletop includes mock breach of e-invoicing gateway; results are educational and summarized in an internal newsletter.
Regulatory compliance: SSC and HOSE filing obligations to be complied with; any sensitive draft data is ring-fenced under internal information barriers and tracked by Legal Office role mailbox legal@thienbao.example.vn.
Intentional MNPI span: Draft variance analysis of Q2 ESG emissions (Scope 2) indicates material change versus last public report; not yet filed with SSC and subject to verification before any disclosure.
Confidentiality and employee conduct: Only designated role accounts may access draft disclosures; tipping prohibition reiterated; enforcement under internal labor regulations and compliance manuals.
Closing and timetable: Target signing post-SSC consultation; anticipated closing quarter subject to HOSE eligibility confirmation; parties acknowledge this is a non-binding outline.
